skill.name: information-security-manager-iso27001
skill.description: Guides ISO 27001 and ISO 27002 security management work for healthcare, HealthTech, and MedTech teams.
skill.summary: Plan ISMS implementation, risk assessments, controls, audits, and healthcare security governance.
skill.author: davila7

security_audit.summary: Static analysis reported weak cryptography, external command, and network reconnaissance patterns, but line review found prose, markdown formatting, placeholder examples, and ISO security terminology. No malicious intent, credential access, data exfiltration, prompt injection, or executable dangerous behavior was found.

low_findings.title: False positive weak cryptography detections
low_findings.description: The reported locations discuss ISO 27001, ISO 27002, cryptography as a control topic, privacy by design, placeholder asset examples, and placeholder reference sections. No weak cryptographic algorithm implementation, recommendation, or executable cryptographic code was found. Verdict: FALSE_POSITIVE.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Direct line review shows descriptive security governance content and placeholders, not crypto code. The repeated SKILL.md line 3 detections all map to the same ISO standards description.

low_findings.title: False positive external command detections
low_findings.description: The reported backtick locations are markdown fenced diagrams and inline resource filenames. They do not invoke shell commands, Ruby commands, subprocesses, or user-controlled execution. Verdict: FALSE_POSITIVE.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Every cited backtick is markdown syntax around diagrams or filenames. No command execution API, shell invocation, or instruction to execute these names appears at the cited lines.

low_findings.title: False positive network reconnaissance detection
low_findings.description: The reported line describes general security awareness training as part of an ISMS program. It does not contain network scanning commands, reconnaissance instructions, host discovery, or target enumeration. Verdict: FALSE_POSITIVE.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The line is plain policy and training language. There is no technical network activity or reconnaissance workflow to execute.

content.value_statement: Security teams often need structured ISO 27001 guidance without building every checklist from scratch. This skill helps plan ISMS work, assess risks, select controls, and prepare healthcare security evidence.
actual_capabilities: Outlines ISO 27001 ISMS planning, scope, objectives, and governance tasks.
Guides information security risk assessment and risk treatment planning.
Maps ISO 27002 control categories to policy, people, physical, and technical controls.
Supports healthcare, MedTech, HIPAA, GDPR, FDA, and NIST security alignment discussions.
Helps structure security metrics, internal audit preparation, management review, and certification readiness.
limitations: Does not replace a certified ISO 27001 lead auditor or legal counsel.
Does not include complete referenced implementation files beyond the main skill text.
Does not run automated security tests or validate live technical controls.
Requires organization-specific evidence, scope, asset inventory, and risk criteria.

use_cases.title: Prepare ISMS Scope and Objectives
use_cases.description: Define boundaries, stakeholders, security objectives, and documentation needs for an ISO 27001 program.

use_cases.title: Plan Healthcare Risk Treatment
use_cases.description: Turn healthcare asset risks into treatment actions, control owners, evidence needs, and monitoring steps.

use_cases.title: Review Certification Readiness
use_cases.description: Organize pre-audit gaps, management review topics, surveillance audit preparation, and remediation priorities.

prompt_templates.title: Create an ISMS Starter Plan
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner planning for a new ISO 27001 program.
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a practical ISO 27001 ISMS starter plan for my organization. Include scope, stakeholders, first documents, risk assessment steps, and a 90-day work plan.

prompt_templates.title: Assess Security Risks
prompt_templates.scenario: Intermediate risk assessment for healthcare systems.
prompt_templates.prompt: Help me assess information security risks for these healthcare assets: [list assets]. Include threats, vulnerabilities, impact, likelihood, risk rating, treatment options, and evidence needed.

prompt_templates.title: Map ISO 27002 Controls
prompt_templates.scenario: Control selection for defined business and regulatory needs.
prompt_templates.prompt: Map relevant ISO 27002 controls for this environment: [describe systems, data, users, and regulations]. Explain control intent, owner, implementation evidence, and monitoring method.

prompt_templates.title: Build Certification Readiness Review
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced preparation for internal or external ISO 27001 audit.
prompt_templates.prompt: Review our ISO 27001 certification readiness using this context: [scope, risks, controls, evidence, incidents, metrics]. Identify gaps, audit risks, management review topics, and prioritized remediation actions.

output_examples.input: Create an ISO 27001 implementation plan for a small HealthTech SaaS company.
output: ISMS scope statement with included systems, data types, locations, and exclusions.
Initial governance plan covering policy, risk methodology, ownership, and review cadence.
90-day action plan for asset inventory, risk assessment, control selection, and evidence collection.

output_examples.input: Assess risks for a cloud service that stores patient support data.
output: Risk register entries for access misuse, data leakage, supplier failure, and incident response gaps.
Treatment recommendations tied to access control, encryption, monitoring, supplier review, and backup testing.
Evidence checklist for audit logs, access reviews, vendor assessments, and incident exercises.

output_examples.input: Prepare a management review agenda for ISMS performance.
output: Agenda sections for security objectives, incidents, risks, audit results, control effectiveness, and improvement actions.
Metric suggestions for training completion, risk treatment progress, incident response time, and audit finding closure.
Decision points for resource needs, accepted risks, policy updates, and certification readiness.

best_practices: Provide scope, assets, data types, regulations, and current controls before asking for recommendations.
Ask for evidence requirements so outputs can support audits and management review.
Validate generated control plans with qualified security, privacy, legal, and compliance owners.
anti_patterns: Do not ask for a generic ISO 27001 plan without organization context.
Do not treat generated guidance as certification approval or legal advice.
Do not skip asset inventory, risk criteria, or ownership when planning controls.

faq.question: Can this skill certify my organization for ISO 27001?
faq.answer: No. It can help prepare documentation, risks, controls, and audit readiness, but certification requires an accredited certification body.

faq.question: Is this useful for healthcare and MedTech companies?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill includes healthcare security, medical device cybersecurity, HIPAA, GDPR, FDA, and NIST alignment topics.

faq.question: Can it create a complete risk assessment?
faq.answer: It can structure a risk assessment and suggest risks, controls, and evidence. You must supply accurate asset and business context.

faq.question: Does it run security scans?
faq.answer: No. It provides governance and assessment guidance. It does not perform live scanning, penetration testing, or technical validation.

faq.question: Which tools can use this skill?
faq.answer: The report lists support for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.

faq.question: What should I provide before using it?
faq.answer: Provide ISMS scope, asset inventory, data classifications, regulatory needs, current controls, incidents, and audit goals.
